verdict.note: both illegal sets exit 1 with the exact intelligible reason (plugin exclusivity / missing landing folder); nothing written for the bad set.

fresh project, no harnesses field, spex materialize: Claude CLAUDE.md block + .claude/settings.json AND Codex AGENTS.md block + .codex/hooks.json both delivered (+ codex trust in isolated CODEX_HOME).
narrowing to [claude] pruned exactly codex's products (AGENTS.md block, .codex/hooks.json, CODEX_HOME trust) while claude artifacts and user prose outside the managed block survived; .spec untouched.

A (reproduce): narrowing spexcode.json harnesses {claude,codex}->{codex} does NOT move the gate key (hp_config_hash covers only .config content + renderer version, not the persisted policy files), so the dispatch.sh auto re-render never fires — .claude + the CLAUDE.md block persist until an unrelated .config edit or a manual materialize. Control confirms the gate READS the persisted selection once it does fire.

B (fixed): hp_config_hash folds in the main checkout's spexcode.json + spexcode.local.json — narrowing harnesses to [codex] moves the gate key, ONE dispatch.sh event later .claude is fully pruned (shim+skills+agents+dir, CLAUDE.md gone, no ignore entries), codex untouched, second event no-ops. The A→B pair proves the auto path; no manual materialize anywhere.
re-measured on the chain change: plugin+native and bare-plugin both exit 1 with the exact stated reason; nothing written.
re-measured: omitted field delivers both natives (CLAUDE.md+.claude shim, AGENTS.md+.codex shim).
re-measured: narrowing to [claude] prunes exactly codex's products (AGENTS.md block stripped, .codex pruned, global trust gone) while user prose, claude artifacts, and .spec survive.
